# External Data (Planned)

FBref player-level passing and possession stats for future X-Factor feature improvement.

Planned files:
- fbref_passing_epl.csv, fbref_passing_laliga.csv, etc.
- Columns needed: Player, Nation, KP (key passes), PrgP (progressive passes), Mis (miscontrols), Dis (dispossessions) per 90

Status: FBref standard stats collected (2,952 players). Passing/possession tables not yet available at sufficient granularity for international data.
